news_data.title: Silicon Valley Bank Collapses After Depositor Bank Run
news_data.snippet: SVB became the largest US bank failure since 2008 after depositors withdrew $42B in a single day.

news_data.title: FDIC Takes Control of Silicon Valley Bank
news_data.snippet: Federal regulators seized SVB assets after the bank failed to raise emergency capital to cover bond losses.

news_data.title: SVB's Concentrated Startup Exposure Proved Fatal
news_data.snippet: Over 90% of deposits were uninsured, heavily concentrated among VC-backed tech startups.

news_data.title: SVB's $17B Unrealized Bond Losses Triggered Panic
news_data.snippet: Rising interest rates caused massive mark-to-market losses on SVB's held-to-maturity bond portfolio.

news_data.title: SVB Contagion Fears Spread to Regional Banks
news_data.snippet: Signature Bank and First Republic saw sharp deposit outflows as fears of broader banking crisis grew.

social_data.title: GET YOUR MONEY OUT OF SVB NOW
social_data.snippet: Multiple VCs telling portfolio companies to pull deposits immediately. This is a full bank run.

social_data.title: SVB Withdrawal Warning
social_data.snippet: Our startup had $8M in SVB. We got out $2M before the freeze. This is devastating for the ecosystem.

social_data.title: SVB Depositor Anxiety Thread
social_data.snippet: Can't access our operating account. 200 employees depend on us making payroll Friday. Terrified.

review_data.title: SVB Employee Review — Relationship Manager
review_data.snippet: Leadership failed us. We had no warning. Great colleagues but catastrophic risk management at the top.

review_data.title: SVB Employee Review — Risk Analyst
review_data.snippet: CRO position was vacant for 8 months. Concerns about interest rate risk were dismissed by management.
